posts.title: M.J.E.R.D Enterprise Launches Wefunder Regulation CF Campaign
posts.excerpt: M.J.E.R.D Enterprise, Inc. officially launches its community investment round on Wefunder, targeting $50,000 to $124,000 under Regulation CF.
posts.body: M.J.E.R.D Enterprise, Inc. officially launches its community investment round on Wefunder, targeting between $50,000 and $124,000 under Regulation CF. The raise is structured as a Revenue Share Loan offering investors 3% of gross revenue until they receive a 2.2X return (early bird) or 1.9X return (standard). Minimum investment is $100.

posts.title: M.J.E.R.D Enterprise Completes Delaware C-Corporation Conversion
posts.excerpt: M.J.E.R.D Enterprise, Inc. successfully converts to a Delaware C-Corporation, establishing the institutional legal foundation for its acquisition strategy.
posts.body: M.J.E.R.D Enterprise, Inc. successfully converts from a Florida LLC to a Delaware C-Corporation (EIN: 41-3584270). The company foreign-qualifies in Florida and establishes the M.J.E.R.D Legacy Trust as the umbrella beneficiary structure. Headquarters remain in Boynton Beach, Florida.

posts.title: Ur Gains Fitness Identified as First Acquisition Target
posts.excerpt: M.J.E.R.D Enterprise identifies Ur Gains Fitness as its primary acquisition target with $61,379.77 in documented gross revenue Jan-Oct 2025.
posts.body: M.J.E.R.D Enterprise identifies Ur Gains Fitness as its primary first acquisition target in the Fitness and Wellness vertical. The business generated $61,379.77 in documented gross revenue from January through October 2025. Capital raised through the Wefunder campaign will be deployed toward closing this acquisition.

posts.title: M.J.E.R.D Enterprise Founded
posts.excerpt: Martin J. Dacelin founds M.J.E.R.D Enterprise with a vision to build a diversified holding company across four core verticals.
posts.body: Martin J. Dacelin founds M.J.E.R.D Enterprise with a singular vision: to build the Berkshire Hathaway of small business — a diversified holding company acquiring profitable, undervalued businesses across Fitness and Wellness, Automotive, SaaS, and Franchise verticals.
